notes: Global pharmaceutical-industry technical association. Publishes the GAMP series (Good Automated Manufacturing Practice) — the dominant framework for pharmaceutical computer-systems validation and automation security. Paid via ISPE.

match_nodes.description: ISPE GAMP 5 — Good Automated Manufacturing Practice

data.official_name: ISPE GAMP 5 - A Risk-Based Approach to Compliant GxP Computerized Systems
data.notes: Paid. Foundational framework for pharma manufacturing computer-system validation; widely required for FDA / EMA inspections. Second Edition (2022) updated for cloud, AI/ML, and modern software practices.
